ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: Inside the NBA

It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.East.us2.title: Weapons
HBO.East.us2.description: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

HBO.East.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.East.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.East.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.East.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.description: Bill Maher hosts the 24th season of his award-winning talk show, covering the week's news and featuring a panel of varied guests.

HBO.East.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.East.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.East.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.East.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.East.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.East.us2.description: Nashville neighbors Joanne and Steven's friendship ruptures beyond repair; in San Antonio, Jeff obsesses over Alexa's 8-foot concrete wall.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.description: Bill Maher hosts the 24th season of his award-winning talk show, covering the week's news and featuring a panel of varied guests.

HBO.East.us2.title: Monster-in-Law
HBO.East.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

HBO.East.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Cornhole
HBO.East.us2.description: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs.

HBO.East.us2.title: Date Night
HBO.East.us2.description: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.East.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.East.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.East.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.East.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.East.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.East.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.East.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.East.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.East.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.East.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.East.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.East.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.East.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.East.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

HBO.East.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.East.us2.description: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

HBO.East.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: A God Walks Into ABar
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Angela's mysterious past in Vietnam is at last revealed.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Watchmen
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: See How They Fly
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Everything ends for real this time.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Blair Witch Project
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Marie Antoinette
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Babygirl
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Real Women Have Curves
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Curves on a blossoming young woman can be sexy, but not if you are told you have too many of them. "Real Women Have Curves" is a humorous and warmhearted look at a Mexican-American teenage girl coming of age in a boiling cauldron of cultural expectations, class constrictions, family duty, and her own personal aspirations.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Introducing Dorothy Dandridge
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Based on a true story, this film chronicles the life of Dorothy Dandridge, the first black woman to be nominated for an Oscar for Best Actress. Dandridge (Halle Berry) begins her career working as a nightclub singer before eventually breaking into Hollywood, where she meets her steadfast manager (Brent Spiner) and struggles against racism. Her rise to stardom introduces her to Otto Preminger (Klaus Maria Brandauer), a film director with whom she develops a complicated relationship.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Inception
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Smashing Machine
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Substance
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Beasts of the Southern Wild
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Six-year-old Hushpuppy lives with her father, Wink, in a remote Delta community. Wink is a stern taskmaster, but he is preparing his young daughter for the end of the world. When Wink falls mysteriously ill, nature seems to fall ill with him. Temperatures rise, the ice caps melt, and fearsome prehistoric beasts called aurochs run loose. Rising waters threaten to engulf their community, sending Hushpuppy in search of her long-lost mother.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Gloria: In Her Own Words
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The life of Gloria Steinem, feminist and political activist.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Opus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Lola Versus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiance, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: All Eyez on Me
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Veronica Mars
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With her graduation from law school imminent, Veronica Mars is interviewing with prestigious New York law firms when she gets a call from ex-boyfriend Logan, who has been accused of murder. Veronica returns to Neptune to help Logan find a good defense attorney, but when she becomes suspicious of the way Logan's case is being handled, she finds herself being pulled back into a life she thought she had left behind: that of an amateur sleuth.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Fargo
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: "Fargo" is a reality-based crime drama set in Minnesota in 1987. Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the rest to satisfy his debts. The scheme collapses when the thugs shoot a state trooper.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wit
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Professor Vivian Bearing (Emma Thompson), an expert on the work of 17th-century British poet John Donne, has spent her adult life contemplating religion and death as literary motifs. Diagnosed with advanced ovarian cancer, she consents to an aggressive and experimental form of chemotherapy administered by Dr. Kelekian (Christopher Lloyd) and his assistant, Dr. Posner (Jonathan M. Woodward), her former student. Facing death on a personal level, she reflects on her life and work.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Bessie
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Blues singer Bessie Smith (Queen Latifah) rises to fame in the 1920s to become a musical legend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Pope's Exorcist
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Shame
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Successful and handsome New Yorker Brandon (Michael Fassbender) seems to live an ordinary life, but he hides a terrible secret behind his mask of normalcy: Brandon is a sex addict. His constant need for gratification numbs him to just about everything else. But, when Sissy (Carey Mulligan), Brandon's needy sister, unexpectedly blows into town, crashes at his apartment and invades his privacy, Brandon is finally forced to confront his addiction head-on.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.West.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.West.us2.description: Nashville neighbors Joanne and Steven's friendship ruptures beyond repair; in San Antonio, Jeff obsesses over Alexa's 8-foot concrete wall.

HBO.West.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.West.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.West.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.West.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. HBO.West.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.West.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.West.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.West.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.West.us2.title: Inception
HBO.West.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.West.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

HBO.West.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Christmas With the Kranks
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Finally alone for the holidays, Luther (Tim Allen) and Nora Krank (Jamie Lee Curtis) plan to eschew the Christmas traditions and take a cruise in the Caribbean instead. This doesn't sit well with their Christmas-obsessed neighbors Vic Frohmeyer (Dan Aykroyd) and Walt Scheel (M. Emmet Walsh), who are determined to win the annual "best decorated street" competition, and the Kranks soon find themselves social outcasts because of their lack of Christmas spirit.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Taking Woodstock
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the summer of 1969, Elliot Tiber divides his time between Greenwich Village and the upstate ramshackle motel, El Monaco, of his Old World parents. When the proposed venue for the upcoming Woodstock concert falls through, Elliot steps in and plays a pivotal role in the generation-defining event by helping organizers secure Max Yasgur's nearby farm for the festival and offering the El Monaco as the home base.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Give It a Year
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgency, in hopes of overthrowing Spengo and rescuing his wife.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: It's Complicated
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fargo

Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the rest to satisfy his debts. The scheme collapses when the thugs shoot a state trooper.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dave Seville, the Chipmunks and the Chipettes are taking a luxury cruise to the International Music Awards. Of course, Alvin cannot resist the urge to create havoc, and the singing rodents soon find themselves marooned on a seemingly deserted island. While Dave and an unlikely ally launch a search, Alvin and company discover that they are not alone on the island, as they first thought.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flow

With few resources at their disposal, Rick, Holly and Will must rely on their only ally, a primate named Chaka (Jorma Taccone), to try to survive long enough to figure out a way back home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ne Zha 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Dirty Work

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: One of One

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: One Last Record
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After years of denial, in 2004, Pete Rose publicly admits that he bet on the game of baseball; Rose confronts the truth about his public image and makes one last bid for MLB reinstatement and enshrinement in the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 1 (1954-1957)
ACC.Network.us2.description: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 2 (1958-1968)
ACC.Network.us2.description: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 3 (1966-1972)
ACC.Network.us2.description: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 4 (1973-1974)
ACC.Network.us2.description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 5 (1975-1980)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

ACC.Network.us2.title: College Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.description: The No. 1 Blue Devils host the No. 17 Tar Heels at Cameron Indoor Stadium in Durham. Duke sits atop the ACC standings with North Carolina in fourth place. North Carolina won the first meeting of the season in a dramatic fashion defeating Duke 71-68.

NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
AMC.HD.us2.description: Living undercover in Brazil, master assassin Arthur Bishop (Jason Statham) springs back into action after an old enemy (Sam Hazeldine) kidnaps the woman (Jessica Alba) he loves. To save her life, Bishop must kill an imprisoned African warlord, a human trafficker (Toby Eddington) and an arms dealer (Tommy Lee Jones), all while making the deaths look like accidents. When things don't go exactly as planned, Bishop turns the tables on the people who forced him out of retirement.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Miami-Dade detectives Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) blow a fuse when $100 million worth of heroin they recently confiscated is heisted from station headquarters. Suspecting it was an inside job, Internal Affairs gives them five days to track down the drugs before they shut down the narcotics division. Action meets farce when Marcus is compelled to masquerade as his partner in order to gain the trust of a call girl (Tea Leoni), a key witness in their investigation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job

AMC.HD.us2.title: Donnie Brasco
AMC.HD.us2.description: Joseph Pistone (Johnny Depp) is an FBI agent who has infiltrated one of the major New York Mafia families and is living under the name Donnie Brasco. He develops a relationship with mob hitman Benjamin "Lefty" Ruggiero (Al Pacino) in order to get deeper under cover, but ends up developing a real friendship with the Mafioso. As their relationship develops, Pistone must decide whether to complete his job, knowing that it will lead to the murder of his new friend.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Gangster
AMC.HD.us2.description: Frank Lucas earns his living as a chauffeur to one of Harlem's leading mobsters. After his boss dies, Frank uses his own ingenuity and strict business code to become one of the inner city's most powerful crime bosses. Veteran cop Richie Roberts senses a change in the mob's power structure and looks for ways to bring his opponent to justice.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Casino
AMC.HD.us2.description: In early-1970s Las Vegas, low-level mobster Sam "Ace" Rothstein (Robert De Niro) gets tapped by his bosses to head the Tangiers Casino. At first, he's a great success in the job, but over the years, problems with his loose-cannon enforcer Nicky Santoro (Joe Pesci), his ex-hustler wife Ginger (Sharon Stone), her con-artist ex Lester Diamond (James Woods) and a handful of corrupt politicians put Sam in ever-increasing danger. Martin Scorsese directs this adaptation of Nicholas Pileggi's book.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Goodfellas
AMC.HD.us2.description: Henry Hill, a poor Irish-Italian growing up in the 1950s New York City, rises through the ranks of his neighborhood's organized crime branch; he ends up in the FBI's witness protection program after testifying against his former partners.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deep Impact
AMC.HD.us2.description: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

Earth's billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist (Chiwetel Ejiofor), world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society. When the global cataclysm finally occurs, failed writer Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) tries to lead his family to safety as the world starts falling apart.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una muchacha está obsesionada con ganar el premio Nobel, para poder gratificar a sus padres de cualquier manera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia, quien es hipocondríaca, consulta al "Doctor Google" y demanda al supuesto médico por estafa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acción del partido de la SheBelieves Cup 2026. Estados Unidos se enfrenta a Colombia. Desde el Sports Illustrated Stadium, en Harrison, Nueva Jersey.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel busca cambiar de género, sus hermanas están preocupadas por su salud mental. Lo que ellas desconocen es que necesita castrarse para controlar el impulso de querer tener sexo con niños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No voy a criar a la hija de otra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras recibir a la hija de la amante de su esposo, Maricela se arrepiente de la decisión porque la joven muestra conducta agresiva y se niega a respetar las reglas de convivencia en su hogar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya sé por qué mi marido tiene mamitis
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cinthia quiere el divorcio, su suegra amamanta a su esposo Armando desde que él tenía ocho años, según parece es lo que le ayuda a controlar la ansiedad, los medicamentos no le funcionan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol estelar Liga MX: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Mexicano Primera División
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acción de la jornada 10 del Clausura 2026 de la Liga MX. Nueva edición del Clásico Regio. Tigres busca ganar tras perder y Rayados hilar dos victorias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos y John quieren adoptar a las gemelas de Orlando, quienes se quedaron sin mamá. Además, despiden a Zuli del bar donde trabajaba porque no supo comportarse durante una fiesta fetiche.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se solicita empleo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis es un hombre soberbio que renuncia a su empleo por considerase superior. Un error que le cuesta caro porque su esposa Teresa está embarazada y podrían perderlo todo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermana se quedó con mis sobras
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jaqueline y Omar estaban casados, cuando ella sorprendió a su marido con su hermana en la cama. Aunque la pareja nunca se divorció, la amante cree tener todo el derecho de quedarse con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Autodestrucción; Demencia con armas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Camila escala montañas y necesita una operación compleja para continuar su deporte, pero sus padres quieren que pare. Natalia pide el divorcio porque su esposo es agresivo con ella y con su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Jugada sucia; Asesina por accidente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juliana acusa a Nila de pegarle gonorrea a una comuna que hace orgías, y la culpa de quitarle un contrato. Susana pide cárcel para Rosy por la muerte del bebé que se le cayó de las manos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: No se Mande Profe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un profesor de literatura ama a una alumna y para complacerla se disfraza como los personajes que la joven admira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Traigo la sangre caliente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A pesar de que Pablo es un jugador, Susana decide huir con él, porque lo ama, contra la oposición de su hermano. En una partida, Pablo lo pierde todo y le proponen apostar a su mujer. Él decide abandonar esa vida, sin imaginar lo que le espera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Buscando el perdón de mis hijos; Hijo por adicción
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Eduardo está en vida vegetal y ahora su padre reaparece para recuperar a la familia. Por otro lado, Fernando descubre que su ex involucra a su niño en estafas de seguros de autos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ADN confundido; Más sabe el diablo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andreina usa la herencia que el abuelo le dejó a su hija, a quien creyó muerta, pero cuando ella reaparece, reclama lo suyo. Marta descubre que su niña adoptada es hija de su esposo y su prima.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un corazón para Raquel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Raquel es una abogada de divorcios despiadada. Ella sufre un infarto y descubre que necesita un trasplante de corazón. Sus sentimientos cambian y decide abandonar su carrera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El tóxico contagió de celos al papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esteban obligó a su novia a dejar el trabajo, sus estudios, no la deja salir e instaló una cámara en su cuarto, además busca un salón para casarse con Sonia, sin preguntarle primero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sacrificio por amor; Pelea en redes sociales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gilberto es menor de edad y se casa, sin permiso, con una mujer mucho mayor que él. Además, Leo y Pikete son dos "influencers" que sostienen una rivalidad para ver quién tiene mayor alcance.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Microchip para mi madre; O te casas o te mueres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Manuela quiere someter a su madre a una cirugía experimental e implantar un chip en su cerebro. Eliana le pide matrimonio a la hija de Liliana a través de un video, pero con una soga al cuello.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Yo te acepto como esposa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura queda destrozada cuando el avión en el que viajaba su esposo Alberto tiene un accidente y no hay sobrevivientes. Una tragedia que le permite descubrir que durante años vivió una mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enséñame humildad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marina vive en la calle y es víctima de explotación. Ella sueña con estudiar y mejorar su vida, pero su situación no se lo permite. Luego de que Leopoldo la atropella con su auto, la vida cambia para ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lazos recuperados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Federico y Mónica pierden a su hijo Jorgito justo el día del nacimiento de Pablito. El padre, ante el dolor, se entrega a la bebida y abandona a su familia, pero los lazos de amor siempre pueden recuperarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro de Diego y Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe le quita el negocio al cártel de los Gaona y, ahora, es ella quien pasará la droga a Estados Unidos. Diego teme que la maten y decide buscarla. El Corona encuentra a su hijo, Ricardo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A la primera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jonathan debe responder correctamente para que su hermano César logre entrar a la jaula. Angélica y Sergio buscan el dinero en efectivo, pero en la cuarta pregunta se intensifica la situación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La suplente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ximena, actriz que suplanta a la insoportable Úrsula, se asegura el debut con malas mañas. Al intentar corregir, descubre que alguien más trama arruinar su sueño para siempre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esteban obligó a su novia a dejar el trabajo, sus estudios, no la deja salir e instaló una cámara en su cuarto, además busca un salón para casarse con Sonia, sin preguntarle primero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mujer ordeña mi negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis está harto de que su esposa lo acuse de infiel para robarle. Convencida de que todo lo que él tiene es gracias a ella, Claudia se aferra al refrán: "Ojo de loca no se equivoca".

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Robo a distancia; El infierno
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María apoyó a su esposa para que viniera a Estados Unidos y durante un tiempo le envió dinero, ahora pide que se lo devuelva. Lázaro exige la custodia total de la hija que tiene con Elisa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Clamidia; Que entre el Espíritu Santo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jackie descubre que su marido le fue infiel porque la contagia con clamidia, él suplica por otra oportunidad. Un sacerdote saca el demonio del cuerpo de las mujeres con un ritual sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por precoz se quedó sin sus XV años
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriel, decepcionado, suspende la fiesta de 15 años de su hija tras enterarse de que mantiene relaciones sexuales con su novio, y que la madre le compra pastillas anticonceptivas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amador quiere una indemnización, está convencido de que le dispararon por ser de raza negra. Jorge reclama una compensación porque le dejaron unas tijeras dentro del cuerpo en una operación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrés acusa a Gregory por racista, lo culpa de la deportación de su padre. María causa un accidente al conducir un auto de juguete bajo efectos del alcohol, su hermana la demanda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esperanza regresa a México después de pasar seis años en Estados Unidos. Su hija menor no la reconoce y el mayor la trata con frialdad. Cuando se descubre su cáncer, todos cambian de actitud.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Raúl le detienen la aplicación de ciudadanía en EE. UU. porque los datos de su padre no coinciden. Una niña sueña con ser la Dra. Polo y su padre la apoya, pero su madre se opone.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Falsa fuga; Traidor familiar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Franco es policía y demanda a su ex Johana porque ella finge el secuestro de sus hijos para huir de sus maltratos. Exagente de ICE deporta a su papá, ahora quiere hacer lo mismo con su hermano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secreto de hermanas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricio se casa con Rosa María porque está embarazada, sin saber que Delia también espera un hijo suyo. Con el tiempo, Edna y Mariana se convierten en amigas, aunque no tienen idea del lazo que las une.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un nuevo amanecer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eugenia está a punto de perder la vista, pero su familia no tiene recursos para una cirugía. Conoce a Daniel y el amor florece, pero una amenaza familiar pone en peligro la posibilidad de que estén juntos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Álvaro abandona su casa, le dice a Soledad que ya no la ama. Los hijos le reclaman a la madre lo sucedido y deciden irse también. Después de maltratarla, se ven obligados a pedir perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gracias al pie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio y su hija Marlyn están dispuestos a llevarse el dinero en efectivo, el problema es la velocidad. Jerónimo y Camilo son amigos, ellos quieren ganar un auto, pero E.T. los deja fuera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La hermana Araceli
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Araceli es una monja que se castiga por las culpas del pasado. Al saber que le queda un día de vida, busca el perdón, pero pronto descubre que no es la única afectada por sus actos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por precoz se quedó sin sus XV años
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriel, decepcionado, suspende la fiesta de 15 años de su hija tras enterarse de que mantiene relaciones sexuales con su novio, y que la madre le compra pastillas anticonceptivas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me tira el negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jorge quiere ayuda para ponerle un alto a Lourdes, su mamá, antes de que pierda a todos sus clientes. Como productor de contenido para adultos le iba bien, pero el negocio se fue a pique.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Founding father; Embarazada alborotada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isabella y Gaby se aprovechan de un desamparado que les salvó la vida y gastan el dinero que recaudaron con la excusa de ayudarlo. La mujer de Ricardo está embarazada y lo abusa sexualmente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Mexicano Femenino Primera División
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 10 del Clausura 2026 de la Liga MX Femenil. Una edición más del Clásico Nacional. Chivas busca los primeros puestos y América ganar tras empatar con Rayadas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego rechaza a Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe descubre que Diego tiene otra mujer y jura que no tendrá compasión con él. Quiere armar su imperio de solo mujeres y le pide a Ramona quince de sus chicas. Corona da con Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Chocando con el pasado; El milagro

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Oviedo-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LALIGA VS es un proyecto de LALIGA y los clubes que tiene el objetivo de erradicar el odio dentro y fuera del fútbol, promoviendo una sociedad respetuosa e inclusiva en todos sus ámbitos. Esta plataforma busca inspirar y sensibilizar a los aficionados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Newcastle-Barcelona

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Newcastle-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Valladolid
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda empuja a un Málaga de amplitud y centros medidos que busca continuidad en casa. El Valladolid querrá mandar desde banda y último pase; la gestión de las áreas y el balón parado pueden inclinar el pulso.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Plantío es fortín: Burgos cómodo en duelos, rechaces y centros laterales para sostener el partido en mínimos. Anduva alarga partidos, pero en Burgos mandan los detalles: quien domine segundas jugadas y estrategia tendrá ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Castellón
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Real B quiere continuidad con balón y presión tras pérdida para vivir en campo rival sin desordenarse. El Castellón amenaza por fuera y llega con varios al remate; si equilibra la vuelta tras pérdida, tendrá opciones de romper el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La UD pretende imponer paciencia con balón y ritmo controlado para someter en campo rival. El Ceuta compite muy bien en duelos y juego directo; si resiste el primer arreón y afina la estrategia, tendrá su opción.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Andorra buscará gobernar desde la posesión larga y los pasillos interiores, cuidando la pérdida. El Sporting intentará apretar arriba y cargar área desde los costados; controlar transiciones y segundas jugadas será clave.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Córdoba
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero eleva el voltaje: Racing fuerte en duelos y transiciones, con carga al segundo palo. El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral; si gestiona la pérdida, podrá discutir el ritmo del partido.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Deportivo - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Deportivo - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Riazor exige mando: el Dépor quiere dominar desde banda y centros precisos para acercarse a la zona alta. El Granada, vertical, intentará pisar área con frecuencia; duelo de detalle donde la estrategia puede romper el equilibrio.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Post Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Deportivo - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Leganés - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Butarque suele proponer partidos de mínimos: Leganés cómodo cerrando espacios y castigando en centros y estrategia. El Eibar muerde en campo rival y llega bien por fuera; la concentración en rechaces y la eficacia en el primer golpe serán decisivas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Huesca - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Huesca buscará un partido sobrio en bloque medio, cuidando la espalda y el área propia. El Alba pretende pausa y claridad entre líneas; el balón parado y las segundas jugadas pueden decidir un marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Cádiz buscará un partido de control emocional y centros tensos para instalarse cerca del área rival. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y eficiencia; la estrategia y los rechaces pueden marcar un duelo de márgenes mínimos.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moreno vs. Kavanagh - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first Mexican champion in UFC history headlines the promotion's return to Arena CDMX on Saturday, March 1 as Brandon “The Assassin Baby” Moreno steps in against Lone'er Kavanagh in a five-round flyweight contest. A two-time champion and perennial contender, Moreno earned a victory over Australian Steve Erceg in Mexico City in 2025, marking his first victory on home soil inside the Octagon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 4

Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 326 promises to keep the early-year momentum going as Max “Blessed” Holloway and Charles “Do Bronxs” Oliveira clash for the BMF title to close out the promotion's return to T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas on Saturday, March 8. Coming off a unanimous decision win over Dustin Poirier at UFC 318, Hawaii's Holloway looks to add a third straight BMF bout victory to his sterling resume, which includes a victory over his UFC 326 challenger back when the pair were aspiring featherweights.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moreno vs. Kavanagh - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first Mexican champion in UFC history headlines the promotion's return to Arena CDMX on Saturday, March 1 as Brandon “The Assassin Baby” Moreno steps in against Lone'er Kavanagh in a five-round flyweight contest. A two-time champion and perennial contender, Moreno earned a victory over Australian Steve Erceg in Mexico City in 2025, marking his first victory on home soil inside the Octagon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Chicago with a stacked card featuring one of the most highly anticipated middleweight title fights in years, as South African champion Dricus Du Plessis faces his toughest test to date against unbeaten challenger Khamzat Chimaev. Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1004 - Ultimate Knockouts 30 Years Of Knockouts
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts brings you the best knockouts in the UFC's 30-year history.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.
